# anthropic_organization_member (Data Source)

Fetches a single organization member by user ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_organization_member" "alice" {
  id = "user_01WCz1FkmYMm4gnmykNKUu3Q"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `added_at` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
- `role` (String)
